headline: FIS Expands Community Banking Reach With First Commerce Bank Deal
summary: Fidelity National wins First Commerce Bank for its HORIZON platform, underscoring demand for AI-ready banking tech and its push into modernization-led growth.

raw.headline: FIS Expands Community Banking Reach With First Commerce Bank Deal

headline: FIS Sweeps All Three Chartis Enterprise Market Risk Quadrants in 2026
summary: JACKSONVILLE, Fla., June 18, 2026--Global financial technology leader FIS® has been named a Category Leader across all three quadrants in the Chartis Enterprise Market Risk Solutions, 2026 Quadrant Update, positioning FIS as one of the few providers capable of serving the full breadth of enterprise market risk needs from a single integrated platform.
